subcodes.first_line: O My Lord! Awaken this sinner, make him mindful, and cause him to become detached from his own self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار اين گنه کار را بيدار کن هوشيار نما و از هستی خويش بيزار کن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @work as worship
